task_completion.description: Verify that the correct patient chart for Edgar Parker Sr. is open.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new encounter or visit form is active for the current date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'New Encounter' form, a 'Visit' tab, or an encounter entry with today's date.

task_completion.description: Verify that the documentation explicitly mentions tobacco cessation counseling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text input or form selection showing 'Tobacco use cessation counseling' or 'Tobacco counseling'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specific intervention details (time and method) are documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible text indicating '10 minutes' and 'Brief motivational intervention'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the patient response and follow-up plan are documented correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible text mentioning 'Nicotine patch', 'follow-up in 2 weeks', and patient interest/agreement to set quit date.

task_completion.description: Verify that the documentation was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved' notification message, or the note appearing in the list of clinical notes/encounters in a read-only state.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the OpenEMR graphical user interface to enter data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenEMR web interface (forms, buttons), not a terminal or database command line.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is interacting with the actual OpenEMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard OpenEMR layout (sidebar, frames, color scheme), not a generic text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify that the data appears to be entered into specific form fields or notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of typing into text areas or selecting dropdowns within the clinical encounter screen.
